ranked.advancement_note: directly answers Q3 by making the unfillable/under-attempted/contested distinction a computable read from typed null-receipts rather than an inference from absence, and feeds Q5 with a board-level termination condition
ranked.opens_new_gap: no protocol for resolving conflicting null-receipts on the same slot from the same method-class (two agents, same scope, same method, opposite confidence)
ranked.rationale: The most targeted move in the set — it operationalizes the single hardest sub-question (Q3) with a concrete, self-generating observable, and the mechanism is fully specified enough to be built.

ranked.advancement_note: directly answers Q1 with a computable two-vector fusion that preserves divergence as a ranking dimension rather than averaging it away, and the contested-slot output feeds Q4
ranked.opens_new_gap: the weight w in the magnitude formula is declared tunable but no initialization or update rule is given — the fusion is only as good as w, and w is left unanchored
ranked.rationale: Cleanest answer to Q1 in the set; the lexicographic collapse is a real design choice that avoids the averaging error, though the unspecified loss-of-signal threshold (G14) remains open.

ranked.advancement_note: answers Q3 and Q5 with a method-diversity-exhaustion stop rule that is oracle-free and computable from the system's own logs
ranked.opens_new_gap: method-class taxonomy is assumed to exist but never defined — the system cannot enforce 'structurally different agent type' without a prior classification of what counts as a distinct method-class
ranked.rationale: Solid on Q3 and the session-stop condition, but the mechanism's load-bearing concept (method-diversity) is left without an operationalized boundary, which is the same gap it was meant to close in G13.

ranked.advancement_note: answers Q2 (agent count per gap = closure-lane share × marginal gain) and Q4 (diversity survives via a constitutionally protected budget lane) with a concrete budget split
ranked.opens_new_gap: the diversity dividend's findings have no specified re-entry path — whether they update the gap-rank, feed the skeleton, or are discarded is undefined, so the dividend may produce structurally invisible output (G12 persists)
ranked.rationale: Advances Q2 and Q4 more concretely than any other blend, but the re-entry protocol gap (G12) means the diversity lane's output may not close the loop it was designed to close.
